results.csv.license: CC BY 4.0 - verify current terms on repo
results.csv.coverage: Men's full internationals 1872-present incl. FIFA World Cup
known_caveats: Scores are final results; extra-time outcomes not separated from 90-minute results
Shootout winners recorded separately in shootouts.csv
No club matches; no Olympic/B-team/U-23 matches

elo.csv.source: eloratings.net via Kaggle mirror (Calen manual drop)
known_caveats: Team-name spelling must match results.csv; distiller tolerates misses with null elo
